memberdef.name: Corr_getset
CorrObj_methods
memberdef.initializer:
= { {"reset", (PyCFunction)CorrObj_reset, METH_NOARGS, "Reset state to post-create defaults."},
{"execute", (PyCFunction)CorrObj_execute, METH_VARARGS, "execute(x) -> ndarray
" "
" "Correlate one frame and optionally dump the accumulator.
" "
" " >>> import numpy as np
" " >>> from doppler import Corr
" " >>> obj = Corr(np.zeros(1, dtype=np.complex64), 1, 1)
" " >>> y = obj.execute(1.0 + 0.0j)
" " >>> y.dtype
" " dtype('complex64')
"}, {"destroy", (PyCFunction)CorrObj_destroy, METH_NOARGS, "Release resources."}, {"__enter__", (PyCFunction)CorrObj_enter, METH_NOARGS, NULL}, {"__exit__", (PyCFunction)CorrObj_exit, METH_VARARGS, NULL}, {NULL} }

memberdef.name: CorrObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "spectral.Corr", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(CorrObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)CorrObj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Create a 1-D FFT correlator.\n", .tp_methods = CorrObj_methods, .tp_getset = Corr_getset, .tp_new = CorrObj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)CorrObj_init, }
